title: search-box across indices gets reset after selecting filter in multi-index.
body:
**Bug 🐞**

### What is the current behavior?
It is a nuxt solution.

I have a search page. With 3 indices, I have a search-box which is global above all indices. Then 3 ais-index under this search box. When I have routing on this my search-box get's reset on any facet changes. 

Can't I search across all indices without haveing it inside ais-index? it works when searching. But it gets reset on any changes in the filter and it does not a apply the search to the url.

Here is an image of the filter:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/65391517/138693800-e91b241e-f7c8-4e5a-8a17-2b7443310c17.png)


### Make a sandbox with the current behavior
https://codesandbox.io/s/vigilant-shadow-syliy?file=/src/App.vue 

I wrote a test code for this, iknow it is in hte normal vue template and not nuxt, but the setup would be the same and could not find a template for nuxt.

### What is the expected behavior?

The expected behavior is to save the query in url and not reset it when adding a facet / setting a facet

### Does this happen only in specific situations?
when change in the facets is detected.


### What is the version you are using?

"algoliasearch": "^4.10.5",
"vue-instantsearch": "^3.7.0",

> Always try the latest one before opening an issue.
